Off Calendar Oct-01-2018 Continued To Nov-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ANDY TRAN'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay For Forum Non Conveniens.

Continued to November 1, 2018 per agreement of all parties (email 9-21-18).

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)

Defendant Andy Tran'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay For Forum Non Conveniens
Off Calendar Sep-13-2018 Continued To Oct-01-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
J. Phillip Martin, Esq. Kastner Kim LLP, 650.967.7854, appearing for the Plaintiff David Hopper;
William T. Webb, Esq. Webb Legal Group, 415.277.7200, appearing for the Defendant Andy Tran.

DEFENDANT ANDY TRAN'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY FOR FORUM NON CONVENIENS.

Mr. Martin presents a brief background of the case noting that the parties have been in settlement negotiations. Discussions are held. Mr. Martin stated that the failure to file an opposition was an oversight/mistake.

At the conclusion of discussions, the Court continued the matter to October 1, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., Law & Motion. Plaintiff's opposition is due by September 20, 2018. Defendant's reply is due by September 26, 2018.

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600, 415.551.5868, Email: torreanom@aol.com. =(302/ACM)

Temporary Restraining Order And Order To Show Cause Against Defendant Andy Tran (Added Per Ex Parte Hrg Held On 7/10/18 By Judge Kahn; No Order)
Off Calendar Jul-11-2018 Off Calendar
